    "R1.3": "Audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure (Table 2 and Appendix B).",
    "R1.6": "Reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register, no lost meaning.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (indirect comparison due to minor differences in evaluation protocols across prior work).",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (none found).",

rationale.R1.3: Audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure (Table 2 and Appendix B).
rationale.R1.6: Reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register, no lost meaning.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (indirect comparison due to minor differences in evaluation protocols across prior work).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (none found).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
